testcase.name: Positive and negative validations

failure.message: APITestingWithTestDataParameterised.feature:7 - evaluation (js) failed: baseURL, javax.script.ScriptException: ReferenceError: "baseURL" is not defined in <eval> at line number 1 stack trace: jdk.nashorn.api.scripting.NashornScriptEngine.throwAsScriptException(NashornScriptEngine.java:470)

testcase.failure:
* def loginPath = '/api/login' ............................................ passed Given url baseURL ......................................................... failed

And path apiPath .......................................................... skipped When method get ........................................................... skipped Then status 200 ........................................................... skipped * print "Response: ", response ............................................ skipped Then match response.data.id == 2 .......................................... skipped Then match response.data.email == 'janet.weaver@reqres.in' ................ skipped And match response.data != null ........................................... skipped
